languages.text: "Однако траектория армии Гапраков не пересекалась с сектором событий внутри штаба, что делает вероятность того, что вы виновны в произошедшем, нулевой".
"However, the trajectory of the Gaprak army did not intersect with the sector of events inside the headquarters, meaning that the probability that you are responsible for what happened is zero."
languages.original_text: "Однако траектория армии Гапраков не пересекалась с сектором событий внутри штаба, что делает вероятность того, что вы виновны в произошедшем, нулевой".

traits.locale_text: "However, the trajectory of the Gaprak army did not intersect with the sector of events inside the headquarters, meaning that the probability that you are responsible for what happened is zero."
"However, the trajectory of the Gaprak army did not intersect with the sector of events inside the headquarters, meaning that the probability that you are responsible for what happened is zero."
"However, the trajectory of the Gaprak army did not intersect with the sector of events inside the headquarters, meaning that the probability that you are responsible for what happened is zero."

languages.text: “然而，贾帕克军队的行动轨迹并未与指挥部内的事件发生交集，所以你对发生之事负有责任的可能性为零。”
languages.original_text: "However, the trajectory of the Gaprak army did not intersect with the sector of events inside the headquarters, meaning that the probability that you are responsible for what happened is zero."

traits.locale_text: “然而，贾帕克军队的行动轨迹并未与指挥部内的事件发生交集，所以你对发生之事负有责任的可能性为零。”

languages.text: « Cependant, la trajectoire de l'armée des Gaprak n'a pas croisé le secteur des événements qui se sont produits à l'intérieur du quartier général. En conclusion, la probabilité que vous en soyez responsable est de zéro. »
languages.original_text: "However, the trajectory of the Gaprak army did not intersect with the sector of events inside the headquarters, meaning that the probability that you are responsible for what happened is zero."

traits.locale_text: « Cependant, la trajectoire de l'armée des Gaprak n'a pas croisé le secteur des événements qui se sont produits à l'intérieur du quartier général. En conclusion, la probabilité que vous en soyez responsable est de zéro. »

languages.text: "Ancak Gaprak ordusunun rotası, karargâhın içinde gerçekleşen olayların sektörüyle kesişmiyor. Yani yaşananlardan sizin sorumlu olma ihtimaliniz sıfır."
languages.original_text: "However, the trajectory of the Gaprak army did not intersect with the sector of events inside the headquarters, meaning that the probability that you are responsible for what happened is zero."

traits.locale_text: "Ancak Gaprak ordusunun rotası, karargâhın içinde gerçekleşen olayların sektörüyle kesişmiyor. Yani yaşananlardan sizin sorumlu olma ihtimaliniz sıfır."

languages.text: «Sin embargo, la trayectoria del ejército Gaprak no se intersecó con el sector de los eventos en el interior del cuartel general, lo que significa que la probabilidad de que usted sea responsable de lo ocurrido es cero».
languages.original_text: "However, the trajectory of the Gaprak army did not intersect with the sector of events inside the headquarters, meaning that the probability that you are responsible for what happened is zero."

traits.locale_text: «Sin embargo, la trayectoria del ejército Gaprak no se intersecó con el sector de los eventos en el interior del cuartel general, lo que significa que la probabilidad de que usted sea responsable de lo ocurrido es cero».

languages.text: "Da sich die Trajektorie der Gaprak-Armee allerdings nicht mit dem Sektor von Ereignissen innerhalb des Hauptquartiers kreuzte, geht die Wahrscheinlichkeit, dass Ihr für die Geschehnisse verantwortlich seid, gegen null."
languages.original_text: "However, the trajectory of the Gaprak army did not intersect with the sector of events inside the headquarters, meaning that the probability that you are responsible for what happened is zero."

traits.locale_text: "Da sich die Trajektorie der Gaprak-Armee allerdings nicht mit dem Sektor von Ereignissen innerhalb des Hauptquartiers kreuzte, geht die Wahrscheinlichkeit, dass Ihr für die Geschehnisse verantwortlich seid, gegen null."

languages.text: 「しかし、ギャプラク軍の進路は本部内の出来事の発生区域と交差していません。つまり、あなたが起きた出来事の責任者である可能性はゼロです。」
languages.original_text: "However, the trajectory of the Gaprak army did not intersect with the sector of events inside the headquarters, meaning that the probability that you are responsible for what happened is zero."

traits.locale_text: 「しかし、ギャプラク軍の進路は本部内の出来事の発生区域と交差していません。つまり、あなたが起きた出来事の責任者である可能性はゼロです。」
